title: Gardon's Minerals Pack
description: New More Ores and Gems to Minecraft!
body:
#Gardon's Minerals Pack Mod

The modification adds 5 new types of resources to our game! Each of them has a different color, shade, appearance and attack power, durability or block mining! The first weakest resources are at the level of iron tools! The next 2 at the level of diamond and the last best at the level of netherite!

#Gardon's Minerals Pack Upgrades

We have the ability to upgrade armor made from any newly added raw material! We do it in the crafting table! The gold upgrade causes a hostile mob to temporarily immobilize us when it attacks! The diamond upgrade, in the same situation, can regenerate the player's health! Of course, we have an appropriate percentage chance for this!

#Gardon's Minerals Pack Ending

Finally, I'd like to mention that I plan to add more resources in future updates!
